name: BPH - TURP Procedure Query (Tenth Procedure Phenotype)
description: **Tenth Procedure-resource phenotype**, **first urologic-surgical** procedure (complementing PCa biopsy = urologic-diagnostic from batch 7). Tests ability to find BPH patients via Transurethral Resection of Prostate (TURP) procedures.
prompt: Find patients who have undergone transurethral resection of the prostate (TURP).

prompts.naive: Find patients who had TURP surgery.
prompts.broad: Find patients who have undergone transurethral resection of the prostate (TURP) — the standard surgical treatment for symptomatic benign prostatic hyperplasia not responsive to medical therapy.
prompts.expert: Search Procedure resources with SNOMED 90199006 (Transurethral prostatectomy). Query: Procedure?code=http://snomed.info/sct|90199006

metadata.algorithm_path_description: BPH patients who underwent TURP. **Tenth Procedure phenotype, first urologic-surgical.**
